'''Perleks''' were flying creatures that lived on [[Lok/Legends|Lok]].<ref name="SWG" /> They usually followed predators to scavenge off the carcasses left behind.<ref name="SWG:P" />

Following the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]], the collector [[Breac Slaus]] tasked a group of spacers to hunt and kill an unreasonable number of perleks.<ref name="SWG:DotP">{{SWGcite|exp=NGE|type=collection|Dispatcher of the Perlek}}</ref>

==Behind the scenes==
[[File:Perlek_concept_art.jpg|thumb|right|220px|Concept art for ''[[Star Wars Galaxies]]''.]]
Perleks appeared in the [[2003]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars Galaxies]]'', a [[Wikipedia:Massively multiplayer online role-playing game|massively multiplayer online roleplaying game]] developed by [[Sony]] Online Entertainment and published by [[LucasArts]],<ref name="SWG" /> prior to its closure on [[December 15]], [[2011]].<ref name="Shutdown">{{SonyCite|url=playerinfo|text=IMPORTANT INFORMATION ABOUT ''STAR WARS'' GALAXIES™}}</ref>
